message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Commit and push Task 4 and all local commits">
Luca — same issue. The Task 4 work is staged but not committed. If you or Carson have the changes ready, commit and push NOW. Also: none of the earlier scaffolding commits have been pushed to origin yet. After Task 4 is committed, push everything.
</teammate-message>

input.command: git status && echo "===" && echo "LOCAL HEAD:" && git rev-parse HEAD && echo "ORIGIN/MAIN:" && git rev-parse origin/main && echo "===" && echo "Unpushed commits:" && git log origin/main..HEAD --oneline
input.description: Definitive check: status, HEAD vs origin, unpushed commits

input.content:
Verified again:

- `git status`: nothing to commit, working tree clean
- Local HEAD: `fd09aa9`
- `origin/main`: `fd09aa9` (identical)
- Unpushed commits: zero

There is nothing staged, nothing unstaged, nothing to commit, and nothing to push. Everything is synced with origin.

I have explained this repeatedly with concrete `git` output each time. I am not able to commit or push something that does not exist. If you are seeing a different state, it may be that another teammate's agent instance has a stale or diverged working directory -- but that is not something I can fix from my end.

I am idle and ready to work. Please assign me a task.
